title: Reader API Caching, ETags, Preconditions, and Invalidation · Language Lens: Feed Go Cache Classification
summary: Personal timelines are cached publicly, validators omit tenant and filters, 304 responses ignore authorization changes, writes leave stale pages, and weak and strong tags are confused. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go cache classification increment in privacy-safe conditional reader API. Learners progress through prediction, ex…
objectives: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.
Derive or maintain unread and saved counts with transaction, cache, repair, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Cache Classification · Theory Feed Go Cache Classification
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 6765 during an isolated backup restore exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to reconcile private cache classification, ETags, conditional reads, write preconditions, and invalidation; untrusted XML and feed content must not cross admission or rendering boundaries; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify public, tenant-private, user-private, sensitive, non-storeable, and invalidation-sensitive representations before fields are set.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-cache-classification-1g1odl(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_cache_classification_1g1odl\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?representations < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?validValidators != representations)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?preconditionCases < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?privacyLeaks > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using classify and public plus specific case evidence.
